title: tragoselinum luteum
intro: Tragoselinum luteum, also known as Yellow Sage or Tragopogon, is a perennial plant native to the Mediterranean region, characterized by its yellow flowers and edible roots. The medicinal properties of Tragoselinum luteum include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support the immune system. Tragoselinum luteum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
